extraction.one_line_summary: KÜNG Stefan attacked on the Mollendruz descent, rode solo 59 seconds clear to Morges while peloton refused to organize chase.
tactical_patterns: KÜNG attacked descent after Mollendruz when peloton complacent on designated sprint stage, gained 1:20 before panic set in.
Teams with sprinters failed to organize chase despite sprint finish, losing only 10 seconds in final 10km when gap was closeable.
KÜNG wearing skinsuit for breakaway on sprint stage reveals premeditated long-range attack, not opportunistic move.

rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: Won solo after multi-hour breakaway, third Romandie stage win in four years shows consistent ability to read sprint-stage chaos.
rider_signals.BACKAERT Frederik: positive: Contributed to KÜNG breakaway that peloton failed to control, co-conspirator in successful sprint-stage ambush.
rider_signals.BAGDONAS Gediminas: positive: Part of KÜNG breakaway group that exploited peloton disorganization on expected sprint finish.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Retained GC lead by 10 seconds despite KÜNG stage win, team chose not to chase breakaway on sprint stage.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Remains 14 seconds down in GC after team declined to chase KÜNG breakaway, conserving energy for mountains.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Led peloton sprint for minor places after teams failed to organize chase, lost opportunity on designated sprint stage.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: negative: Despite claiming he liked stage profile, his team failed to chase down winnable breakaway, finished behind BENNETT.
